qa_pairs.question: How can I add a Principal Investigator (PI) to my cloud Resource Allocation Project (RAP) who was not listed as a co-PI in my RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: You can add an associated PI who was not included as a co-PI in your RAC application by following step 4 of the membership management process.

qa_pairs.question: After adding a new Principal Investigator (PI) to my cloud RAP, how do I add their sponsored users?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a new PI is added as a member to your RAP, you will be able to add any of their associated sponsored user roles using the 'In bulk' mechanism explained in step 3.

qa_pairs.question: What access rights do new members automatically receive when added to a RAP for a cloud project?
qa_pairs.answer: Any new member added to a RAP for your cloud project will automatically have access to your cloud allocation.

qa_pairs.question: Can I modify the roles of members or remove them from my cloud project RAP?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, you can promote members to Managers or remove members from your cloud project RAP at any time, if desired.
